content.text: Amritsar GNDU Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about Amritsar GNDU Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar (Punjab) Non-Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 04/2026 Short Details
Notification Out : 07/05/2026 Starting Date : 07/05/2026 Last Date : 28/05/2026 11:59 PM Send Hard Copy : Upto 04/06/2026
General (Consultant Post) : 1180/- SC / BC / PH (Consultant Post) : 590 /- General (All Other Posts) : 944/- SC / BC / PH (All Other Posts) : 472/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : Not Given Age Limit as on : Not Given
Written Exam Practical Test Medical Examination Document Verification

Consultant (Taxation) : Fixed Pay : Rs. 50,000/- PM Estimator : Rs. 29200/- (Level 5) Physiotherapist : Rs. 29200/- (Level 5) Watch & Ward Supervisor : Rs. 21700/- (Level 3) Clerk (Junior DEO) : Rs. 19900/- (Level 2) Security Guard : Rs. 18000/- (Level-1)

Consultant (Taxation) : Chartered Accountant with 05 Years Experience, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject. Estimator : ITI in Civil Draftsman / Diploma in Civil or Architectural Assistantship, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject. Physiotherapist : Degree in Physiotherapy, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject. Watch & Ward Supervisor : Ex- Junior Commissioned Officer, not below the rank of a Subedar-Major or a retired Police Officer not below the rank of an Inspector. These qualifications may be relaxed to the rank of a Subedar for inservice candidates with atleast two years experience in the University, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject. Clerk (Junior DEO) : BCA/B.Sc. (IT)/B.Sc. (Computer Science) OR Graduation with Computer Science as an Elective Subject OR Graduation with (50% marks) and PGDCA OR B.Tech./BE in any Stream with Computers Science Subject OR Master’s degree in Computer Science/ Computer Application / IT, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject. Security Guard : Ex-Servicemen, 10th Class Passed with Punjabi Subject.
